zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Dinham於1443年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯普爾 艾希頓時，她的父親Sir John de Dinham37歲，母親Joan de Arches31歲。她於1469年與Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Dinham于1443年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾斯普爾 艾希頓时，她的父亲Sir John de Dinham37岁，母亲Joan de Arches31岁。她于1469年与Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1509年享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dinham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Dinham was born in 1443, in Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Dinham, was 37 and her mother, Joan de Arches, was 31. She married Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur in 1469, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1509, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Dinham est née en 1443, à Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Dinham, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan de Arches, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur en 1469, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1509, à l’âge de 66 ans.

Sie hat 1469 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1509 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Dinhamが1443年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアスティープル アシュトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Dinhamは37歳，母Joan de Archesは31歳であった。1469年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスでSir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maurと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1509年に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Dinham(이)가 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스티플 애슈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Dinham(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Arches(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1469년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Dinham nasceu em 1443, em Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Dinham, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Arches, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur em 1469, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Dinham родилась в 1443 г. в местности стипл аштон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Dinham было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Arches, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur в 1469 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1509 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

Se casó con Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur en 1469, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas.
